title: Rust workspace and takogami CLI foundation
outcome: Created the Rust workspace (root Cargo.toml + lockfile, rust-toolchain 1.96) and registered packages/takogami in moon. Implemented starbase application shell with clap MVP command tree, stable controller exit codes, minimal JSON error envelopes, doctor build-toolchain skeleton (cargo/rustc/moon PATH checks), and hermetic CLI smoke tests. Unimplemented commands return not_implemented (exit 10) in human and --json modes without panic.
validation: moon run takogami:build/test/lint/format-check PASS. Cargo.lock excludes banned v0 deps (orka, zenoh, ratatui, rmcp, petgraph, daggy). 10 tests PASS (1 unit + 9 integration).
decisions: Library + bin split (lib.rs) so integration tests and starbase session share modules.
starbase 0.13 with miette + tracing features; thin app.rs boundary for framework churn.
Doctor returns exit 1 when required build tools missing; tests inject fake PATH entries hermetically.
Minimal S1 JSON envelope (schema_version/command/status/exit_code/diagnostics) — full CommandEnvelope deferred to S2.
blockers: ontarch:secrets-scan detect mode still reports pre-existing age-secret-key in git history (commit a3a4978) — unchanged; out of E09.S1 scope.
token_note: Loaded STATE + E09.S1 + 2 canon refs + 2 session records vs full E09 epic and Plan/bin collection.
